intent: SEPA Instant Credit Transfer with a conditional cooling-off section that surfaces only for first-time recipients above a 10,000 EUR threshold; releases either after explicit override or after a delayed confirmation.
notes: Stratum banking-retail (ECB SEPA Instant taxonomy). Adversarial-conditional fixture: the cool-off override field is only required when both 'recipient-new' and 'amount > 10000' fire. Models the highest-risk false-positive surface for the validation pipeline.
